summary.intent: Fix failing tests in art-tools after PyGithub 2.x upgrade with GitHub App authentication, then diagnose a production job failure in the promote-assembly pipeline.
summary.outcome: Fixed test_build_microshift.py by removing obsolete mock patches. Identified that production failure is caused by attempting GitHub App auth with 'openshift-bot' user account instead of 'openshift-art-build-bot', and mapped the scope of required changes.

repo: Codebase is migrating from direct Github(token) to get_github_client_for_org() with GitHub App authentication
GitHub App is installed on orgs: 'operator-framework', 'openshift-priv', 'openshift', 'openshift-eng' only
Bot account changed from 'openshift-bot' (user account) to 'openshift-art-build-bot' which has the necessary repo forks
openshift-bot is a GitHub user account, not an org, so GitHub App cannot authenticate as it

code.finding: Changed from 'from github import Github' to 'from artcommonlib.github_auth import get_github_client_for_org'
Had @patch decorators for 'pyartcd.pipelines.build_microshift.Github' that no longer exists in module namespace
Calls get_github_client_for_org('openshift-bot') which fails because GitHub App not installed on that user account
_resolve_installation_id() validates org has GitHub App installed and raises ValueError if not found

workflow: When refactoring authentication code, test mocks can become stale and need cleanup even if tests don't exercise the mocked code paths
GitHub App authentication is org-scoped, not compatible with user accounts used for forking workflows

friction: Test suite had obsolete mocks that weren't caught during the GitHub App auth migration
Production job failure wasn't prevented by existing tests
Bot account name is hardcoded in multiple locations instead of centralized as a constant
open_items: Replace all 'openshift-bot' references with 'openshift-art-build-bot' in promote.py (lines 2039, 2040, 2041, 2052, 2062)
Verify images_streams.py references to 'openshift-bot' are cosmetic (help text/CLI defaults) vs functional
Consider centralizing bot account name as a configuration constant to prevent future hardcoding issues
Deploy fix to resolve production promote-assembly job failures
